reviews.review_description: Love it.  All in the timing.

Had the game for about 2 weeks and JUST made it through level 1😁. I'm not competitive and ok with losing but THIS game takes me to a level that MAKES me want to complete it. Every fall is frustratingly fun! This could easily be a paid app (and I'd be happy to purchase) but the devs made it FREE! Kudos devs and keep up the great work.

What a rush!  The only thing it needs is a pause menu.  But it still deserves 5 stars.  Just finished level 7…WOW!  The optical illusion is unreal!  Best mind parkour, the adrenaline!  You have to get this game!!!!


PLEASE ADD MORE LEVELS!

I would describe it in nearly identical terms. I would like to add that the game is less about reflexes than it is about failing over and over again until you successfully memorize AND execute the timing and duration of the trigger pulls, which can be very difficult and nerve-wracking. I would love to see some more features and actions in this game but it's a fantastic start.

Please add level select once a level is completed/unlocked! This adds so much replay value. Without level select, games feel too linear in their progressions.

UPDATE: Thank you for adding one checkpoint per level. That's the perfect way to break up the progress into chunks. The checkpoints themselves even have clean, crisp aesthetics like the rest of the level, without looking cheesy or out of place. All it needs now is level select for completed/unlocked levels!

Easy 5 stars from me, very generous of devs to provide for free. 

I admit I can only play this for ten minutes before rage-quitting out of frustration, but the euphoria of getting through a level balances it all out!

I'm only up to level 4 so we'll see how much crazier it gets...and judging from other reviews, pretty crazy!

Looks great. Clean, simple asthetic and I think using red and blue works well.
Try this TRONish game, you will not be sorry and it is free!   I wish you could fall longer and farther.

This game was addictive, and I couldn't wait to get back to it once I was done for the day. I was disappointed when I spent 2 days trying to finish a level, then once I passed it I realized it was the end of the game. Definitely looking forward to new levels being added!
Simple, addicting game with high difficulty, appropriate graphics and good gameplay. Room for improvements, but worth to try. Way better than I expected - will follow this game.
The new checkpoints are very welcome and the game helps to relax and get incredibly excited at the same time. Absolutely great!
